variables.notes: No explicit operating D&A row is identified as belonging to COGS/cost of sales. The visible D&A section appears to be a separate operating-expense block outside the selected COGS bucket, but not attributable to COGS specifically. Conservative choice avoids double counting.

candidates.why: This is a separate standalone operating expense line above financial items and at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows ('Employee benefit expenses', 'Other operating expenses', 'Sales and marketing expenses'). Because XSGA was built from those components rather than from the broader 'Operating expenses' total, this D&A appears outside the selected XSGA bucket and should be added separately. It is also the summary row for the underlying D&A components, so it is preferred over components.
Appears to be a component under the summary row 'Depreciation and amortization'; do not use when the summary exists.
Appears to be a component under the summary row 'Depreciation and amortization'; do not use when the summary exists.

R&D-related D&A component under the summary D&A row. Since the visible operating-section XSGA bucket does not already include a separate above-EBIT R&D expense row, this could conceptually belong within XSGA_DA, but the summary row should be used instead to avoid double counting.
Appears to be a component under the summary row 'Depreciation and amortization'; do not use when the summary exists.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA bucket is the sum of specific overhead component rows, not the broader 'Operating expenses' total. The separate 'Depreciation and amortization' line sits alongside those components and therefore should be added separately. Summary row chosen to avoid double counting its components, including R&D amortization.
